user_message: can you teach him how to push to github now?
bot_response:
Sure! Tell him to run these in his project folder:

```
git init
git add .
git commit -m "first commit"
git remote add origin <his-repo-url>
git push -u origin main
```

(He'll need to create the repo on github.com first.) Though given Andrew's track record of "works on my machine" energy, maybe double-check the repo actually has code in it before he pushes.
